title: funastrum flavum
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", Funastrum flavum benefits include anti-inflammatory, antibechic, expectorant, and bacteriostatic effects, indicating its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and infections.
side_effects: Funastrum flavum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing gastrointestinal irritation, leading to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain. Prolonged or excessive consumption of the plant can also cause liver damage and potentially lead to conditions like hepatitis or even liver failure. In some cases, the improper use of funastrum flavum may also trigger allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It's essential to consult a medical professional or an experienced herbalist before using the plant for medicinal purposes to avoid these adverse effects.
